notes: Natural weapons are NOT generic unarmed: they keep their own explicit formula and type (species.db naturalWeapons entries). Never collapse them into the unarmed default and never assume bludgeoning.

Existing type policy: unarmed-attack-helper.js emits damageType 'bludgeoning', which DamageTypeRules normalizes to kinetic. Species natural weapons author slashing/piercing, also kinetic aliases, preserved in originalDamageTypes.

profiles.name: Unarmed strike
notes: Formula from size table in unarmed-attack-helper.js (Medium 1d4, Small 1d3, …).
'bludgeoning' matches the existing helper output and aliases to kinetic.

profiles.name: Natural weapon — claws
notes: Formula per species entry (e.g. Barabel/Cathar/Noghri/Togorian claws 1d4 slashing).

profiles.name: Natural weapon — bite
notes: Formula per species entry (e.g. Barabel bite 1d6 piercing).

profiles.name: Natural weapon — explicit authored type
notes: Catch-all rule profile: whenever a species naturalWeapons entry carries an explicit type (slashing/piercing/bludgeoning/energy…), that type is authoritative — e.g. Conductive-style energy natural weapons.
Only a natural weapon with NO authored type may fall back to kinetic/bludgeoning, and that fallback is flagged by the auditor.
